nasb.text: The nakedness of your father’s wife’s daughter, born to your father, she is your sister, you shall not uncover her nakedness.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s wife’s daughter, brought up in your father’s family, since she is your sister.

cnv.text: 你的繼母為你父親所生的女兒的下體，是你的妹妹，你不可揭露她的下體。

ccb.text: 不可与你父亲妻妾的女儿乱伦。她是你的姊妹，不可与她乱伦。
